feed.title: realufo.org — Brazil · FAB
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Brazil · FAB.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Tranche 5 — final OVNI release (Dec 2016)
entry.summary: Fifth and final tranche closing the OVNI declassification programme — covers reports 2010-2016.

entry.title: FAB Notimp 173 (21/06/2015) — UFO reporting update
entry.summary: A 2015 FAB update reaffirming the role of COMDABRA (Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command) in receiving and cataloging UFO reports.

entry.title: FAB Notimp 250 (08/09/2013) — OVNI policy ordinance
entry.summary: The 2013 FAB instruction (COMAER) that formalised the procedure for registering, handling, and forwarding UFO reports to the Arquivo Nacional.

entry.title: Tranche 4 — V COMAR Recife files (May 2013)
entry.summary: Fourth release: V COMAR Recife regional command records + 1986 "Noite Oficial dos UFOs" radar contacts.

entry.title: Tranche 3 — Operação Prato + Colares files (Mar 2011)
entry.summary: Third release including the full Operação Prato (Operation Saucer) investigation — mass UFO sightings over Colares, Pará (1977).

entry.title: Tranche 2 — CINDACTA + ITA documents (Mar 2010)
entry.summary: Second OVNI release: CINDACTA air-traffic-control records + ITA institute documents.

entry.title: Tranche 1 — initial OVNI release (Mar 2008)
entry.summary: First Arquivo Nacional OVNI release: documents from COMDABRA, IV COMAR, V COMAR covering 1952-1980.

entry.title: Caso Varginha — Jan 1996
entry.summary: The Varginha incident (Jan 1996) — multiple eyewitness reports of UFOs and 'creatures' in Minas Gerais. Military and police involvement extensively documented.

entry.title: Noite Oficial dos UFOs — May 19, 1986
entry.summary: The 'Official Night of UFOs' (19 May 1986) — at least 21 unidentified objects tracked over Brazil by ground radar + F-5E intercepts. Public press conference held by Defence Minister.

entry.title: Operação Prato — Colares incident (Sep-Dec 1977)
entry.summary: Brazilian Air Force investigation of mass UFO sightings over Colares, Pará (1977) — considered the most thorough official UFO investigation ever conducted. Hundreds of witnesses, medical injuries documented.

entry.title: Sistema Sigma — Air Force UAP reporting system (1968)
entry.summary: Sistema Sigma — FAB internal UAP/UFO reporting system established 1968, ran until late 1970s.

entry.title: Arquivo Nacional — Dibrarq · OVNI collection
entry.summary: The Arquivo Nacional's Dibrarq catalog entry for declassified Brazilian UFO records — ~4,500 documents from FAB (1952–2016) transferred to the National Archive in five tranches.

entry.title: FAB CENDOC — Documentos Especiais (Special Documents)
entry.summary: The Air Force's Documentation and History Centre (CENDOC) special-documents catalog. Houses the FAB-originated OVNI files before transfer to Arquivo Nacional.

entry.title: Arquivo Nacional — Comando da Aeronáutica fonds
entry.summary: The Comando da Aeronáutica record group in the National Archive — Brazilian Air Force records including the OVNI files.

entry.title: CENDOC — Arquivo Geral do Comando da Aeronáutica
entry.summary: Overview of CENDOC's general archive of the Brazilian Air Force Command — context and scope of the records that include OVNI files.

entry.title: Arquivo Nacional — OVNI press release & document portal
entry.summary: Official Arquivo Nacional portal announcing each OVNI tranche release with thematic summaries.

entry.title: COMDABRA radar records — unidentified contacts
entry.summary: COMDABRA (Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command) radar logs of unidentified contacts — released under Lei de Acesso à Informação (LAI, 2011).
